response.global_analysis: The audio is a complex, fast-paced medley of 'Kaikai Kitan' (Eve), 'Gira Gira' (Ado), and 'Dappou Rock' (Neru). The singers alternate between these songs frequently. Phonetics match the lyrics of these three songs. I am ignoring the chronological sequence suggested by the reference JSON and instead following the actual audio-visual cues and song titles shown on screen. Subtitles are tightly wrapped to the vocal audio, with pauses respected by splitting blocks.
